title: UK under-16 social media ban fails as government seeks talks
summary_full: It failed to secure enough votes in the House of Commons late on Monday, after the government opposed it in favour of a consultation due in summer
summary_public: It failed to secure enough votes in the House of Commons late on Monday, after the government opposed it in favour of a consultation due in summer
